ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the commodity in the market */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the commodity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the commodity (e.g., Precious Metals, Industrial Metals) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the commodity */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the commodity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the commodity (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the commodity information was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the commodity was first added to the system */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the commodity entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each futures contract */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity the contract is for */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the futures contract */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of the contract */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Total open interest of the contract */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the contract information was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contract was first added to the system */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the contract entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the futures contract the data is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "ltp" REAL /* Last traded price (LTP) of the contract */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the contract on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the contract on the given date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the contract on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the contract on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous close */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume traded on the given date */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Total open interest on the given date */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of the trading day (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data entry was first added to the system */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the market data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user information was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was first created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was first recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price threshold, percentage change) */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert should be triggered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert is active */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last triggered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market report */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
